_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure operational planning efforts are effectively transitioned to current operations.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identifying inefficiencies, designing automation opportunities, and measuring improvement outcomes.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.476), TF-A-004 (TF, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.302). Shared vocabulary: [operational]. DCWF-only terms [current, effectively, efforts, ensure, operations, planning] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.880, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ensure operational planning efforts are effectively transitioned to current oper" and "Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identify" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.501 > STS 0.302 (gap +0.199). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [operational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.9%. Shared tokens: [operational]. DCWF-only: [current, effectively, efforts, ensure, operations, planning]. WIDAI-only: [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.199 with low STS 0.302. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
